name: Compass Minerals International, Inc.
description: Compass Minerals International, Inc. is a leading global provider of essential minerals, including salt, sulfate of potash specialty fertilizer, and magnesium chloride. The company operates key production facilities across North America and the United Kingdom, serving diverse markets such as highway deicing, agriculture, industrial applications, and consumer products. Compass Minerals is dedicated to delivering high-quality mineral products that keep people safe, feed crops, and support critical infrastructure.
